## What

<!-- Brief description of the change -->

## Type

- [ ] `rule:` — new/updated rule content (snippets, overlays)
- [ ] `feat:` — new feature in tooling
- [ ] `fix:` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs:` — documentation
- [ ] `test:` — tests
- [ ] `chore:` — maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] New snippets follow [Snippet Format Spec](../CONTRIBUTING.md#snippet-format-spec)
- [ ] README.md updated (if applicable)
- [ ] README_zh-TW.md updated (if applicable)
